Title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
Writer: Kit Hood, Yan Moore, Linda Schuyler
Actors: Stefan Brogren, Aislinn Paul, Melinda Shankar
Plot: The lives of the kids at Degrassi Community School deal with the serious and sometimes taboo issues that plague teenagers.
Awards: Nominated for 4 Primetime Emmys. 44 wins & 100 nominations total
